summary: Completed testing of CSV upload feature and all existing functionality. Backend: 39/39 tests passed (29 existing + 10 new upload tests). Frontend: 20/20 tests passed (10 upload modal UI tests + 10 existing feature tests). All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: React Flow warning about nodeTypes/edgeTypes - already memoized outside component, warning is a false positive
Select controlled/uncontrolled warning - from Emergent script, not app code
seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 1756 entities and 1917 relations from CSV files
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV upload feature fully tested. Upload button at data-testid='upload-data-btn' in sidebar header. Modal opens with data-testid='upload-modal'. File slots: data-testid='upload-entity-master' and 'upload-entity-relations'. Submit button disabled until both files selected. POST /api/upload validates required columns (ENTITY_ID, COMPANY_NAME for master; PARENT_ID, CHILD_ID for relations). After successful upload, dataVersion counter increments to trigger frontend refresh. All existing features (fund selector, tree, drawer, search, filters, export PDF) continue working.

upload_modal_ui: Upload button visible in sidebar header
Modal shows two file slots (Entity Master, Entity Relations)
Info text about required columns displayed
Cancel and Upload & Replace buttons exist
Upload & Replace button disabled when no files selected
Close button (X) exists in modal header
Modal closes when clicking X button
Modal closes when clicking Cancel button
upload_api: POST /api/upload accepts two CSV files and returns success with counts
POST /api/upload returns error for empty entity_master
POST /api/upload returns error for empty entity_relations
Data persists after upload (entities, funds, filters accessible)
Minimal valid data upload works and data is accessible
existing_features: Fund selector works - selected Fund I and tree loaded with 71 nodes
Entity drawer opens on click and closes on X click
Search works - filters entities by name

console_warnings: React Flow warning about nodeTypes/edgeTypes (false positive - already memoized)
Select controlled/uncontrolled warning (from Emergent script, not app code)
